zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Holcombe於大約1435年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親John Holcombe II27歲，母親Joane Folkeroy13歲。他與Margaret Avenall在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1480年1月20日在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國戴文布藍斯可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Holcombe于大约1435年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲John Holcombe II27岁，母亲Joane Folkeroy13岁。他与Margaret Avenall在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1480年1月20日在他的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在英国戴文布藍斯可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Holcombe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): variant of   Holcomb  .

variants.name: Holcomb
meanings: English (Surrey and Sussex): habitational name from any of several places called Holcombe (Devon, Dorset, Gloucestershire, Lancashire, Oxfordshire, Somerset), from Old English hol ‘hollow’ + cumb ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Holcombe was born about 1435, in Devon, England, his father, John Holcombe II, was 27 and his mother, Joane Folkeroy, was 13. He married Margaret Avenall in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 January 1480, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Branscombe, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Holcombe est né environ 1435, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Holcombe II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joane Folkeroy, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Avenall à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 janvier 1480, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Holcombe um 1435 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Holcombe II 27 und seine Mutter Joane Folkeroy 13. Er hat in Devon, England Margaret Avenall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Januar 1480 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Branscombe, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Holcombe è nato il circa 1435 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, John Holcombe II, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joane Folkeroy, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Avenall nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 gennaio 1480, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Branscombe, Devon, England.

ja.Saint Winifred Churchyard, Branscombe, E: イギリスデボンブランスコンベ
ja.lifeSummary: Roger Holcombeが約1435年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父John Holcombe IIは27歳，母Joane Folkeroyは13歳であった。イギリスデボンでMargaret Avenallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1480年1月20日に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリスデボンブランスコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Holcombe(이)가 대략 1435년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Holcombe II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Folkeroy(은)는 13세였다. 그는 영국 데폰에서 Margaret Avenall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 1월 20일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 브랜스코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Holcombe nasceu aproximadamente 1435, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Holcombe II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joane Folkeroy, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Avenall em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de janeiro de 1480, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Holcombe родился около 1435 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Holcombe II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Folkeroy, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Avenall в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 января 1480 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Holcombe nació aproximadamente 1435, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Holcombe II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joane Folkeroy, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Margaret Avenall en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de enero de 1480, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra.
